163.reason: [The peekChar() call consumes the next character even when it's not '&', causing incorrect advancement and potential misreporting or skipping of characters. It should only peek, not consume.]

174.reason: [Same issue as above: peekChar() advances the input stream even when the next character is not '|', leading to incorrect parsing state and possible missed tokens or wrong error line numbers.]
